message:
perf(time/wheel): bitmap-scan next-deadline via next_occupied_circular()

Add `WheelLevel::next_occupied_circular()` that finds the earliest
occupied slot from the current cursor position using bitmap word
scanning. Replace the brute-force approach in `next_deadline()` —
instead of iterating all occupied slots across all levels to find the
minimum deadline, locate only the nearest occupied slot per level via
circular distance calculation on the bitmap, then scan just that slot's
entries.

Reduces work from O(total_entries) to O(occupied_words +
nearest_slot_entries) per call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
